chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-448 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.1915/2023 3. For hearing of main case 13-09-2023 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
